Convert JSON to text and vice versa: Convertir JSON en texte et vice versa
Use the JSONata language to filter, map,: Utilisez le langage JSONata pour filtrer, cartographier et transformer nativement les payloads JSON complexes en JavaScript.
Combine an array of JSON objects into a: Combine an array of JSON objects into a single object using a per-field merge strategy.
Map the array or object you want to mani: Mappez le tableau ou l'objet que vous voulez manipuler.
Write a JSONata expression to manipulate: Écrire une expression JSONata pour manipuler vos données. Vous pouvez filtrer des tableaux, extraire des champs spécifiques, grouper des éléments ou remanier le JSON. (par exemple, $[status="active"])
An array of JSON objects to merge, e.g. [{"title":"Q1","total":10},{"total":12,"author":"Jane"}]. Map the array output of a previous step here.
How to resolve any field not listed belo: How to resolve any field not listed below. "Last found" mirrors a plain object merge where later objects win.
Override the default strategy for specif: Override the default strategy for specific fields. Each row maps one field name to a strategy.
